name: Bourbon Chicken
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix all the marinade ingredients and pour over chicken pieces in a zip lock bag, removing as much air as possible before zipping.
2. Let stand for several hours (best overnight).
3. Bake chicken at 350°F for one hour in a single layer, basting every 10 minutes.
4. Remove chicken pieces to a platter and keep warm.
5. Scrape pan juices with all the brown bits into a small saucepan, heat, and add 2 tablespoons white wine.
6. Serve over chicken.
